prevalence.trend: stable; associated with smoking, asthma and GERD

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; significant QOL and sleep impact
burden.source: WHO Europe respiratory symptom burden context

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Cough >8 weeks; evaluate common causes and exclude red flags

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care evaluation; chest imaging and spirometry available
